title: The Delayed Flight
content: Marcus arrived at the airport expecting a simple trip, but a message on the departure screen changed his plans. His flight had been delayed because of bad weather. At first, the delay was only one hour, but later it became three. Marcus spent the extra time reading, drinking coffee, and walking around the terminal. Many passengers complained, but there was nothing anyone could do. Finally, the airline announced boarding, and everyone lined up quickly. Although the delay was frustrating, Marcus was grateful that the flight would continue safely once the weather improved.
